name: Segment (Twilio Segment)
description: Customer data platform: event ingestion, destinations, and bundled analytics.js / Analytics 2.0.
methodology: Map writeKey / source IDs in payloads; verify PII and consent before forwarding. Review which destinations are enabled (may duplicate events to ad pixels). Test batch vs realtime APIs. Org-specific: add patterns for custom CDN or proxy hostnames if you route Segment through your domain.
